docket_entries.description: REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST RONALD DONG AND JEANETTE CORDERO'S JOINDER IN DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ALL PARTIES ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THE TENANTS WERE INDISPENSABLE PARTIES AND WERE NOT NAMED AS PARTIES WITHIN 90 DAYS AS REQUESTED BY CCP SECTION 1094.6. THE FACT THAT THE PETITION WAS SENT TO THE TENANTS DOES NOT CHANGE THE RESULT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS FILED BY PETITIONER WOO, HARRY

RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL STABILIZATION DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ALL PARTIES ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THE TENANTS WERE INDISPENSABLE PARTIES AND WERE NOT NAMED AS PARTIES WITHIN 90 DAYS AS REQUESTED BY CCP SECTION 1094.6. THE FACT THAT THE PETITION WAS SENT TO THE TENANTS DOES NOT CHANGE THE RESULT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing And Demurrer To Amended Petition For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Jul-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL STABILIZATION DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS

Appearances:
Weldon Bradstreet of Sheppard Rosen (296-0900 x26) for real parties in interest
Karen Uchiyama (563-9301) for petitioner and opposing party
Wayne Snodgrass of the Office of the City Attorney (554-4675) for respondent and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained without leave to amend. All parties acknowledge that the tenants were indispensable parties and were not named as parties within 90 days as requested by CCP section 1094.6. The fact that the petition was sent to the tenants does not change the result. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

(Joinder) In Demurrer To Amended Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus

MINI MINUTES: REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST RONALD DONG AND JEANETTE CORDERO'S JOINDER IN DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS

Appearances:
Weldon Bradstreet of Sheppard Rosen (296-0900 x26) for real parties in interest
Karen Uchiyama (563-9301) for petitioner and opposing party
Wayne Snodgrass of the Office of the City Attorney (554-4675) for respondent and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained without leave to amend. All parties acknowledge that the tenants were indispensable parties and were not named as parties within 90 days as requested by CCP section 1094.6. The fact that the petition was sent to the tenants does not change the result. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
